nodes.name: === Changelog ===
nodes.info:
### 2026-05-05
- Iter2: wire monitoring pipeline. cron-plus tick @ 180s aligned -> cb_evaluate -> alert MQTT (`checkbattery/alert`) + InfluxDB `infra.bms_health`.
- Health checks: comm dropout (3min), cell delta warn/alert (50/100mV), cell hard limits (2.8/3.6V), per-cell outlier (30mV from bank avg), temperatures 1+2 (-10/50°C, sensors 3/4 ignored), MOSFET temp (60°C), switch charge/discharge OFF, BMS reboot, cycle counter monotonic.
- InfluxDB metrics per bank: soc_percent, total_voltage, current, power, balance_current, num_cycles, cell_delta/min/max/avg, capacity_ah, mosfet_temp, temp1, temp2.
- Alerts emit only on state transitions (active / cleared) — no per-tick spam.

### 2026-05-05
- Bootstrap: subscribe to bat_ost, bat_west, bat_big at central MQTT broker; capture last payload per leaf-topic into `global.checkbattery_samples` for schema discovery.
